content_body: What a great cabin to come to and get away from our busy lives. Sometimes amidst the crazy lives, yet wonderful, that God has given us, we forget what comfort our families bring to us! Being in this cabin throughout these days, we have enjoyed, laughed, and have remembered what our family has achieved in our 16 years of marriage. On a different note, we caught our first carp and enjoyed every minute of it! We only hope that this cabin touches the heart of others as it did for us. ~The Dominguez Family
title: This Cabin Touched Our Hearts!
